scripts.check:demo-src-no-js: if rg --files apps/demo/src -g '*.js' -g '*.jsx' > /dev/null; then echo 'Error: JavaScript source files are not allowed in apps/demo/src'; rg --files apps/demo/src -g '*.js' -g '*.jsx'; exit 1; fi
scripts.build: bun run check:demo-src-no-js && bun --filter @rolha/datatable build && bun --filter @rolha/demo build
scripts.test:cypress:component: VITE_CJS_IGNORE_WARNING=true env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE cypress run --component --browser electron --headless
scripts.test:cypress:e2e: VITE_CJS_IGNORE_WARNING=true env -u ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE start-server-and-test "bun --filter @rolha/demo dev --host 127.0.0.1 --port 5173" http://127.0.0.1:5173 "cypress run --e2e --browser electron --headless --config baseUrl=http://127.0.0.1:5173"
